positive: A whimsical, stylized representation of a steaming cup of coffee and a stack of glowing books, floating against a clean, geometric pastel gradient background. The coffee steam forms delicate, swirling patterns of abstract nature elements—like miniature crescent moons, stylized stars, and floating leaves. Use a vibrant, contrasting color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and sage green, ensuring all elements are defined by clean silhouettes and high contrast against the background. The composition must be centered, allowing for clear visual hierarchy and ample white space around the edges for print versatility. Minimalist, sticker-art style, vector graphic quality, highly detailed, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, realistic photography, photorealism, grain, noise, artifacts, messy, cluttered, cropped, distortion
